calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Continued To Nov-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rory Clark appeared by telephone for Wells Fargo Bank. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Yvette Mitchell (Daughter of Decedent) in Propria Persona. Rhonda Mitchell (Daughter of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

Yvette Mitchell stated that they were objecting to Wells Fargo's petition and that they intend to petition to administer the Estate themselves. Mr. Ferdon explained his role and why he was present. Mr. Clark had no further thoughts and stated that the matter should be continued to allow the Daughters to file their petition. The Court suggested to the Daughters that they seek legal advise. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to November 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that one or both of the Daughters petition to administer the Estate.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Sep-26-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
